config.script:
'TRACE #include "50306"
#ifdef _DEBUG #ifndef MACRO_BCSTRACE TRACE2FILE_NAME(bcstrace) #macro BCSTRACE(message) TRACE2FILE("bcs.log", message, bcstrace) #define MACRO_BCSTRACE #endif #else #ifndef BCSTRACE #define BCSTRACE ' #endif #endif
'choose_rejestr_dok #include "50517"
'srvdate #include "50126"
'================================================================================== ' export '==================================================================================
private function date2BCS(byval dDate) date2BCS = trans_.afc.convert.Formatter("%1-%2-%3 0:00")(Day(dDate))(Month(dDate))(Year(dDate)).Done() end function
private function write_position(byref pSO,byref pDokPosition) pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<position>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_name><![CD"+"ATA[" + pDokPosition.pProdukt.strNazwa + "]"+"]></gds_name>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_bar_code><![CD"+"ATA[" + pDokPosition.pOpak.strEAN + "]"+"]></gds_bar_code>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_index><![CD"+"ATA[" + pDokPosition.pProdukt.strIndeks + "]"+"]></gds_index>" + vbCrLf
dim nPacks : nPacks = clng(0) dim curKrotnosc : curKrotnosc = pDokPosition.pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(pDokPosition.pProdukt.listOpakowania.count()).currKrotnosc
dim nUnits : nUnits = clng(pDokPosition.curIloscOpak) dim nAllUnits : nAllUnits = clng(pDokPosition.curIloscOpak) dim nUnitsInPack : nUnitsInPack = clng(curKrotnosc)
pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_packs>" + cstr(nPacks) + "</gds_packs>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_units>" + cstr(nUnits) + "</gds_units>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_all_units>" + cstr(nAllUnits) + "</gds_all_units>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_units_in_pack>" + cstr(nUnitsInPack) + "</gds_units_in_pack>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_created_date>" + date2BCS(DateSerial(1899,12,30)) + "</gds_created_date>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<section />" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "</position>" + vbCrLf end function
private function write_positions(byref pSO,byref pDokListPos) pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "<doc_positions>" + vbCrLf dim pDokPosition for each pDokPosition in pDokListPos write_position pSO,pDokPosition next pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "</doc_positions>" + vbCrLf end function
private function write_dochead(byref pSO,byref pDokument,byval strType) pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "<doc_head>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<type>" + strType + "</type>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<name><![CD"+"ATA[" + pDokument.strNrDok + "]"+"]></name>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<store><![CD"+"ATA[" + pDokument.pMagDocel.strNazwa + "]"+"]></store>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<doc_created_date>" + date2BCS(pDokument.dDataWyst) + "</doc_created_date>" + vbCrLf ' pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<doc_dependent_name />" + vbCrLf ' pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<doc_dependent_created_date>" + date2BCS(DateSerial(1899,12,30)) + "</doc_dependent_created_date>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "</doc_head>" + vbCrLf end function
function write_document(byref pSO,byref pDokument,byval strType) pSO.write string(1,vbTab) + "<document>" + vbCrLf write_dochead pSO,pDokument,strType write_positions pSO,pDokument.listPozycje pSO.write string(1,vbTab) + "</document>" + vbCrLf end function
function begin_write_stream(byref pSO) pSO.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250"" ?>" + vbCrLf pSO.write "<doc_XML>" + vbCrLf end function
function end_write_stream(byref pSO) pSO.write "</doc_XML>" + vbCrLf end function
function generate_stan_mag(byval pMagazyn , byval strNrDok , byval strPath) dim pStream:set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() begin_write_stream pStream pStream.write "<document>" + vbCrLf write_stanmag_head pStream,strNrDok,pMagazyn.text,srvDate pStream.write string(2,vbTab) + "<doc_positions>" + vbCrLf
dim adors:set adors = trans_.createadors(bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn(pMagazyn.idobj)) while not adors.eof write_stan_mag_position pStream , cstr(adors.fields("produkt_indeks").value) , cstr(adors.fields("produkt_nazwa").value) , cstr(adors.fields("produkt_kod_kreskowy").value) , ccur(adors.fields("produkt_ilosc").value) , clng(adors.fields("produkt_id").value) adors.movenext wend
pStream.write string(2,vbTab) + "</doc_positions>" + vbCrLf pStream.write "</document>" + vbCrLf end_write_stream pStream pStream.save strPath end function
function write_stan_mag_position (byref pSO , byval strIndeks , byval strNazwa , byval strKod , byval curIlosc , byval prod_idobj ) pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<position>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_name><![CD"+"ATA[" + strNazwa + "]"+"]></gds_name>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_bar_code><![CD"+"ATA[" + strKod + "]"+"]></gds_bar_code>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_index><![CD"+"ATA[" + strIndeks + "]"+"]></gds_index>" + vbCrLf
dim nPacks : nPacks = clng(0) dim pProdukt:set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT , prod_idobj) dim curKrotnosc : curKrotnosc = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(pProdukt.listOpakowania.count()).currKrotnosc
dim nUnits : nUnits = clng(curIlosc) dim nAllUnits : nAllUnits = clng(curIlosc) dim nUnitsInPack : nUnitsInPack = clng(curKrotnosc)
pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_packs>" + cstr(nPacks) + "</gds_packs>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_units>" + cstr(nUnits) + "</gds_units>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_all_units>" + cstr(nAllUnits) + "</gds_all_units>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_units_in_pack>" + cstr(nUnitsInPack) + "</gds_units_in_pack>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<gds_created_date>" + date2BCS(DateSerial(1899,12,30)) + "</gds_created_date>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(4,vbTab) + "<section />" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "</position>" + vbCrLf end function
function write_stanmag_head(byref pSO , byval strNrDok , byval strMagazyn , byval dData) pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "<doc_head>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<type>STAN MAGAZYNU</type>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<name><![CD"+"ATA[" + strNrDok + "]"+"]></name>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<store><![CD"+"ATA[" + strMagazyn + "]"+"]></store>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<doc_created_date>" + date2BCS(dData) + "</doc_created_date>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<doc_dependent_name />" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(3,vbTab) + "<doc_dependent_created_date />" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "</doc_head>" + vbCrLf end function
function generate_products_dictionary(byval pMagazyn , byval strPath) dim pStream:set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim pProdukt dim curKrotnosc dim nUnitsInPack
pStream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250"" ?>" + vbCrLf pStream.write "<dictionary_goods>" + vbCrLf if not pMagazyn is nothing then dim adors:set adors = trans_.createadors(bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn(pMagazyn.idobj)) while not adors.eof
set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,clng(adors.fields("produkt_id").value)) curKrotnosc = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(pProdukt.listOpakowania.count()).currKrotnosc nUnitsInPack = clng(curKrotnosc)
write_prod_position pStream , cstr(adors.fields("produkt_nazwa").value) , cstr(adors.fields("produkt_indeks").value) , cstr(adors.fields("produkt_kod_kreskowy").value) , nUnitsInPack adors.movenext
wend else dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, "eRodzaj=N5PRODUKT_TOWAR" , "" , "") dim produkt for each produkt in cursor
curKrotnosc = produkt.listOpakowania.get(produkt.listOpakowania.count()).currKrotnosc nUnitsInPack = clng(curKrotnosc)
write_prod_position pStream , produkt.strNazwa , produkt.strIndeks , produkt.listopakowania.get(1).strEAN , nUnitsInPack next end if pStream.write "</dictionary_goods>" + vbCrLf pStream.save strPath end function
function write_prod_position(byref pSO , byval strNazwa , byval strIndeks , byval strKod , byval curKrotnosc ) pSO.write string(1,vbTab) + "<goods>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "<gds_name><![CD"+"ATA[" + strNazwa + "]"+"]></gds_name>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "<gds_bar_code><![CD"+"ATA[" + strKod + "]"+"]></gds_bar_code>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "<gds_index><![CD"+"ATA[" + strIndeks + "]"+"]></gds_index>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(2,vbTab) + "<gds_units_in_pack>" + cstr(clng(curKrotnosc)) + "</gds_units_in_pack>" + vbCrLf pSO.write string(1,vbTab) + "</goods>" + vbCrLf end function
function generate_stores_dictionary(byval strPath) dim pStream:set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() pStream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250"" ?>" + vbCrLf pStream.write "<dictionary_store>" + vbCrLf dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN , "" , "" , "") dim magazyn for each magazyn in cursor pStream.write vbTab + "<store>" + vbCrLf pStream.write string(2,vbTab) + "<store_name><![CD"+"ATA[" + magazyn.strNazwa + "]"+"]></store_name>" + vbCrLf pStream.write string(2,vbTab) + "<salesman_name><![CD"+"ATA[" + magazyn.strNazwa + "]"+"]></salesman_name>" + vbCrLf pStream.write vbTab + "</store>" + vbCrLf next pStream.write "</dictionary_store>" + vbCrLf pStream.save strPath end function
'================================================================================== ' import '==================================================================================
class CBCSStruct
public m_strNrDok public m_dDataWyst public m_strStore public m_strSalesman public m_pPositions
private sub class_initialize() set m_pPositions = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() m_strStore = "" m_strSalesman = "" end sub
public function add_new() dim pPos:set pPos = new CBCSStructPosition m_pPositions.add pPos set add_new = m_pPositions.value(m_pPositions.UpperIndex) end function
public function fill_from_stanmag(byval pMagazyn) m_strStore = pMagazyn.text dim adors:set adors = trans_.createadors(bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn(pMagazyn.idobj)) while not adors.eof adors.movenext wend end function
end class
class CBCSStructPosition public m_strNazwa public m_strIndex public m_curIlosc public m_bUsed
private sub class_initialize() m_strNazwa = "" m_bUsed = false end sub
end class
class CBCSParser
private m_strCurrentTag private m_strCurrentDokType private m_pCurrentDok private m_pCurrentPoz private m_strLastError
private m_nMode private m_strDokType private m_bSkip
private sub class_initialize() m_strLastError = "" set m_pCurrentDok = nothing set m_pCurrentPoz = nothing m_strDokType = "" m_bSkip = false end sub private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pCurrentDok = nothing set m_pCurrentPoz = nothing end sub
public function OnElementStart(byval strTag,byref pAttr)
if is_error() then exit function end if
m_strCurrentTag = strTag trans_.message 0,0,"start:" + strTag
if strTag = "position" then if skip_document() then exit function end if on_new_position end if
end function public function OnElementEnd(byval strTag)
if is_error() then exit function end if
if strTag="document" and not skip_document() then m_strLastError = "tryb update - koniec dokumentu" end if
trans_.message 0,0,"end:" + strTag m_strCurrentTag = "" end function public function OnData(byval strValue)
if is_error() then exit function end if
trans_.message 0,0,"value:" + strValue select case m_strCurrentTag case "type" m_strCurrentDokType = strValue if skip_document() then exit function end if on_new_document
case "name" if skip_document() then exit function end if on_name strValue
case "doc_created_date" if skip_document() then exit function end if on_date strValue
case "store" if skip_document() then exit function end if dim idMag : idMag = lookup_magazyn(strValue , store_is_required() ) if is_error() then exit function end if on_set_store idMag
case "salesman" if skip_document() then exit function end if dim idMagS : idMagS = lookup_magazyn(strValue , salesman_is_required() ) if is_error() then exit function end if on_set_salesman idMagS
case "gds_index" if skip_document() then exit function end if dim idProd : idProd = lookup_produkt(strValue) if is_error() then exit function end if on_set_produkt idProd case "gds_packs" if skip_document() then exit function end if case "gds_all_units" if skip_document() then exit function end if on_set_ilosc ccur(strValue) end select end function
public function store_is_required() store_is_required = true if (m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK) or (m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK) then store_is_required = (m_pCurrentDok.pRejestrDok.eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__MM) end if
end function
public function salesman_is_required() salesman_is_required = true if (m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK) or (m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK) then salesman_is_required = (m_pCurrentDok.pRejestrDok.eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__PW or m_pCurrentDok.pRejestrDok.eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__MM) end if end function
public function on_set_ilosc(byval curValue) if m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK or m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK then m_pCurrentPoz.curIloscOpak = curValue else m_pCurrentPoz.m_curIlosc = curValue end if
end function
public function on_set_produkt(byval idProd) dim pProdukt:set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProd) if m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK or m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK then set m_pCurrentPoz.pProdukt = pProdukt else m_pCurrentPoz.m_strIndex = pProdukt.strIndeks end if end function
public function on_new_position if m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK or m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK then set m_pCurrentPoz = m_pCurrentDok.listPozycje.addnew() else set m_pCurrentPoz = m_pCurrentDok.add_new() end if end function
public function on_name(strValue)
#comment BCS - przy imporcie, dokument MM otrzymuje numer taki, jaki #comment byl na handheldzie. Chyba lepiej bedzie jak numer MM #comment bedzie nadawany automatycznie 'jezeli pracujemy z dokmag to ustawiamy odpowiednio numer if m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK or m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK then ' m_pCurrentDok.strNrDok = strValue else ' m_pCurrentDok.m_strNrDok = strValue end if end function
public function on_date(strValue) 'jezeli pracujemy z dokmag to ustawiamy odpowiednio numer if m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK or m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK then m_pCurrentDok.dDataWyst = cdate(strValue) else m_pCurrentDok.m_dDataWyst = cdate(strValue) end if end function
public function on_set_store(idMag) if idMag < 1 then exit function end if dim pMagazyn:set pMagazyn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,idMag) if m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK or m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK then select case m_pCurrentDok.pRejestrDok.eTyp case N5REJESTRDOK__PZ set m_pCurrentDok.pMagDocel = pMagazyn case N5REJESTRDOK__WZ,N5REJESTRDOK__RW,N5REJESTRDOK__MM,N5REJESTRDOK__MR set m_pCurrentDok.pMagZrod = pMagazyn end select else m_pCurrentDok.m_strStore = pMagazyn.text if m_pCurrentDok.m_strSalesman = "" then m_pCurrentDok.m_strSalesman = pMagazyn.text end if end if end function
public function on_set_salesman(idMag) if idMag < 1 then exit function end if dim pMagazyn:set pMagazyn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,idMag) if m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK or m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK then select case m_pCurrentDok.pRejestrDok.eTyp case N5REJESTRDOK__PW,N5REJESTRDOK__MM,N5REJESTRDOK__MP set m_pCurrentDok.pMagDocel = pMagazyn end select else m_pCurrentDok.m_strSalesman = pMagazyn.text end if end function
public function on_new_document
'na podstawie typu tworzymy odpowiedni dokument 'ustawiamy też zmienne środowiskowe
if m_strCurrentDokType = "ZALADUNEK" then select case m_nMode case BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = clng(choose_rejestr_dok(cstr(N5REJESTRDOK__RW),true, "Wybierz rejestr RW")) set m_pCurrentDok = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG) case BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK case BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_STRUCT case BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_STRUCT end select set m_pCurrentPoz = nothing end if
end function
public function skip_document()
m_bSkip = false skip_document = m_bSkip
if m_strDokType = "" or m_strDokType = m_strCurrentDokType then exit function end if
m_bSkip = true skip_document = m_bSkip
end function
public function is_error() is_error = (m_strLastError <> "") end function
public function get_lasterror() get_lasterror = m_strLastError end function
#comment'------------------------------------------------------------------------------
private function lookup_magazyn(byref strValue , bReguired) dim idMag : idMag = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,"strNazwa='" + _ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(trim(strValue)) + "'") if idMag = 0 and bReguired then m_strLastError = "Nie znaleziono magazynu " + strValue end if if idMag < 0 then m_strLastError = "Zduplikowana nazwa magazynu " + strValue end if lookup_magazyn = idMag end function
private function lookup_produkt(byref strValue) dim idProd : idProd = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,"strIndeks='" + _ trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(trim(strValue)) + "'") if idProd = 0 then m_strLastError = "Nie znaleziono produktu o indeksie " + strValue end if if idProd < 0 then m_strLastError = "Zduplikowany produkt o indeksie " + strValue end if lookup_produkt = idProd end function
public sub set_mode_update_doc(byref pDokMag) m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_DOK set m_pCurrentDok = pDokMag end sub
public sub set_mode_new_doc() m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_DOK end sub
public sub set_mode_update_struct(byref pStruct) m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_UPDATE_STRUCT set m_pCurrentDok = pStruct end sub
public sub set_mode_new_struct() m_nMode = BCS_IMPORT_MODE_NEW_STRUCT end sub
public sub set_doc_type(byval strDok) m_strDokType = strDok end sub
end class
function read_stream(byref pSI) dim pCBCSParser : set pCBCSParser = new CBCSParser doc_.parsexml pCBCSParser,pSI read_stream = pCBCSParser.get_lasterror() end function
function update_doc_from_stream(byref pSI , byref pDokMag , byval strDok) dim pCBCSParser : set pCBCSParser = new CBCSParser pCBCSParser.set_mode_update_doc pDokMag pCBCSParser.set_doc_type strDok
doc_.parsexml pCBCSParser,pSI update_doc_from_stream = pCBCSParser.get_lasterror() end function
function update_doc_from_stream_zaladunek(byref pSI , byref pDokMag) update_doc_from_stream_zaladunek = update_doc_from_stream( pSI , pDokMag , "ZALADUNEK") end function
function update_doc_from_stream_zamowienie(byref pSI , byref pDokMag) update_doc_from_stream_zamowienie = update_doc_from_stream( pSI , pDokMag , "ZAMOWIENIE") end function
function update_struct_from_stream(byref pSI , byref pStruct , byval strDok) dim pCBCSParser : set pCBCSParser = new CBCSParser pCBCSParser.set_mode_update_struct pStruct pCBCSParser.set_doc_type strDok
doc_.parsexml pCBCSParser,pSI update_struct_from_stream = pCBCSParser.get_lasterror() end function
function get_BCSStruct() set get_BCSStruct = new CBCSStruct end function
'select file #include "50123"
'CFileDrive #include "50211"
function read_file_2_struct()
set read_file_2_struct = nothing
dim strPath strPath=SelectFile("c:\", "*.xml", "")
if (len(strPath)=0) then exit function end if
dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() pStream.attach strPath
dim pStruct set pStruct = get_BCSStruct()
update_struct_from_stream pStream , pStruct , ""
set read_file_2_struct = pStruct
end function
function make_raport(byref pTBContainer , byval pBCSStruct)
pTBContainer.newrow pTBContainer.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTBContainer.newcell.addtext "Produkt" pTBContainer.newcell.addtext "Indeks" pTBContainer.newcell.addtext "Eurobiznes" pTBContainer.newcell.addtext "BCS"
dim idMagazyn:idMagazyn = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, "strNazwa like '"+pBCSStruct.m_strSalesman+"'") if idMagazyn < 1 then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Brak w bazie magazynu, ktory został wczytane z pliku ze stanem magazynowym" exit function end if dim adors:set adors = trans_.createadors(bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn(idMagazyn)) dim iter
while not adors.eof
dim strProdInx:strProdInx = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_indeks").value) dim strProdNazwa:strProdNazwa = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_nazwa").value) dim strProdIlosc:strProdIlosc = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_ilosc").value)
dim pBCSStructPosition:set pBCSStructPosition = nothing for iter = 0 to pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.upperIndex set pBCSStructPosition = pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.value(iter) if pBCSStructPosition.m_strIndex = strProdInx then pBCSStructPosition.m_bUsed = true exit for else set pBCSStructPosition = nothing end if next
pTBContainer.newrow pTBContainer.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY
pTBContainer.newcell.addtext strProdNazwa pTBContainer.newcell.addtext strProdInx
pTBContainer.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTBContainer.addtext strProdIlosc
if not pBCSStructPosition is nothing then ' stan z BCS pTBContainer.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTBContainer.addtext cstr(pBCSStructPosition.m_curIlosc) if pBCSStructPosition.m_curIlosc <> ccur(strProdIlosc) then pTBContainer.element.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) end if else pTBContainer.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTBContainer.addtext "<brak>" pTBContainer.element.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) end if
adors.movenext wend
dim idProd,pProdukt
for iter = 0 to pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.upperIndex set pBCSStructPosition = pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.value(iter) if not pBCSStructPosition.m_bUsed then
idProd = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, "strIndeks like '"+pBCSStructPosition.m_strIndex+"'")
if idProd > 0 then
set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT , idProd)
pTBContainer.newrow pTBContainer.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY
pTBContainer.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strNazwa pTBContainer.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strIndeks
pTBContainer.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTBContainer.addtext "<brak>" pTBContainer.element.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0)
pTBContainer.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTBContainer.addtext cstr(pBCSStructPosition.m_curIlosc)
else trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Brak w bazie produktu, ktory został wczytany z pliku ze stanem magazynowym - " + cstr(pBCSStructPosition.m_strIndex) end if
end if
next
end function
function make_raport_param(byref pTBContainerWiecej , byref pTBContainerBraki , byref pTBContainerOK , byval pBCSStruct , byval idrejestr , byval dDataOd , byval dDataDo , byref strMagazyn , byref strMagazyn2)
if idrejestr = 0 then trans_.message 1002, 0 , "Nie wskazano rejestru dokumentów" exit function end if
dim idMagazyn:idMagazyn = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, "strNazwa like '"+pBCSStruct.m_strSalesman+"'") if idMagazyn < 1 then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Brak w bazie magazynu, ktory został wczytane z pliku ze stanem magazynowym" exit function end if
strMagazyn2 = pBCSStruct.m_strStore
dim perf:set perf = doc_.performing("Trwa tworzenie raportu .....")
strMagazyn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,idMagazyn).text
make_header pTBContainerWiecej make_header pTBContainerBraki make_header pTBContainerOK
dim adors:set adors = trans_.createadors(bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn(idMagazyn)) dim adors_sprzed:set adors_sprzed = trans_.createadors(bqry_stan_mag_for_faktury(idRejestr , dDataOd , dDataDo)) dim adors_przychod:set adors_przychod = trans_.createadors(bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn_by_date_and_ilosc(idMagazyn , dDataOd , dDataDo)) dim iter
dim strProdInx dim strProdNazwa dim strProdIlosc dim strProdIloscSprzed dim strProdIloscPrzychod dim strProdIloscBCS dim pBCSStructPosition dim strJednostka dim prec
while not adors.eof
strProdInx = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_indeks").value) strProdNazwa = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_nazwa").value) strProdIlosc = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_ilosc").value) strProdIloscSprzed = get_ilosc_by_inx ( adors_sprzed , strProdInx , "produkt_ilosc_sprzedana") strProdIloscPrzychod = get_ilosc_by_inx ( adors_przychod , strProdInx , "produkt_ilosc") strJednostka = cstr(adors.fields("jednostka").value) prec = clng(adors.fields("jednostka_prec").value) - 1
set pBCSStructPosition = nothing for iter = 0 to pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.upperIndex set pBCSStructPosition = pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.value(iter) if pBCSStructPosition.m_strIndex = strProdInx then strProdIloscBCS = pBCSStructPosition.m_curIlosc pBCSStructPosition.m_bUsed = true exit for else set pBCSStructPosition = nothing strProdIloscBCS = ccur(0) end if next
if ccur(strProdIloscBCS) > ccur(strProdIlosc) then insert_row pTBContainerWiecej , strProdNazwa , strProdInx , strProdIloscBCS , strProdIlosc , strProdIloscSprzed , strProdIloscPrzychod , strJednostka , prec end if
if ccur(strProdIloscBCS) = ccur(strProdIlosc) then insert_row pTBContainerOK , strProdNazwa , strProdInx , strProdIloscBCS , strProdIlosc , strProdIloscSprzed , strProdIloscPrzychod , strJednostka , prec end if
if ccur(strProdIloscBCS) < ccur(strProdIlosc) then insert_row pTBContainerBraki , strProdNazwa , strProdInx , strProdIloscBCS , strProdIlosc , strProdIloscSprzed , strProdIloscPrzychod , strJednostka , prec end if
adors.movenext
wend
strProdIlosc = ccur(0) strProdIloscSprzed = ccur(0) strProdIloscBCS = ccur(0)
'teraz faktury set adors = trans_.createadors(bqry_stan_mag_for_faktury(idrejestr , dDataOd , dDataDo)) while not adors.eof strProdInx = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_indeks").value) strProdNazwa = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_nazwa").value) strProdIlosc = ccur(0) strProdIloscSprzed = cstr(adors.fields("produkt_ilosc_sprzedana").value) strProdIloscPrzychod = get_ilosc_by_inx ( adors_przychod , strProdInx , "produkt_ilosc") strJednostka = cstr(adors.fields("jednostka").value) prec = clng(adors.fields("jednostka_prec").value) - 1
set pBCSStructPosition = nothing for iter = 0 to pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.upperIndex set pBCSStructPosition = pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.value(iter) if pBCSStructPosition.m_strIndex = strProdInx and not pBCSStructPosition.m_bUsed then strProdIloscBCS = pBCSStructPosition.m_curIlosc pBCSStructPosition.m_bUsed = true exit for else set pBCSStructPosition = nothing end if next
'wtedy jest w fakturach, jest w BCS ale nie ma w stanmag if not pBCSStructPosition is nothing then insert_row pTBContainerWiecej , strProdNazwa , strProdInx , strProdIloscBCS , ccur(0) , strProdIloscSprzed , strProdIloscPrzychod, strJednostka , prec end if
adors.movenext wend
'a teraz tylko to co jest w bcs a nie ma nigdzie indziej dim idProd dim pProdukt for iter = 0 to pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.upperIndex set pBCSStructPosition = pBCSStruct.m_pPositions.value(iter) if not pBCSStructPosition.m_bUsed then
idProd = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, "strIndeks like '"+pBCSStructPosition.m_strIndex+"'")
if idProd > 0 then
set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT , idProd) strJednostka = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(1).pJednOpak.strSkrot
strProdIloscPrzychod = get_ilosc_by_inx ( adors_przychod , pProdukt.strIndeks , "produkt_ilosc")
prec = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(1).pJednOpak.nDokladnosc - 1
insert_row pTBContainerWiecej , pProdukt.strNazwa , pProdukt.strIndeks , pBCSStructPosition.m_curIlosc , ccur(0) , ccur(0) , strProdIloscPrzychod , strJednostka , prec
else trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Brak w bazie produktu, ktory został wczytany z pliku ze stanem magazynowym - " + cstr(pBCSStructPosition.m_strIndex) end if
end if
next
set perf = nothing
end function
function insert_row(byref pTB , strProdNazwa , strProdInx , strProdIloscBCS , strProdIlosc , strProdIloscSprzed , strProdIloscPrzychod , strJednostka , prec) pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY
pTB.newcell.addtext strProdInx
'przychody pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(strProdIloscPrzychod,strJednostka,prec)
'rozchody pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(strProdIloscSprzed,strJednostka,prec)
'stan wg eb pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(strProdIlosc,strJednostka,prec)
'stan wg bcs pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(strProdIloscBCS,strJednostka,prec)
'bcs - eb pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(ccur(strProdIloscBCS) - ccur(strProdIlosc),strJednostka,prec)
pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.addtext ""
'strProdIloscPrzychod
end function
function make_header(byref pTB) pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER
pTB.newcell.addtext "Indeks" pTB.element.size = clng(15) pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
pTB.newcell.addtext "Przychody" pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
pTB.newcell.addtext "Rozchody" pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
pTB.newcell.addtext "Stan wg EB" pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
pTB.newcell.addtext "Stan wg BCS" pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
pTB.newcell.addtext "BCS-EB" pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
pTB.newcell.addtext "Adnotacje"
end function
function get_ilosc_by_inx(byval rs , byval strProdInx , byval strFldName ):get_ilosc_by_inx = ccur(0)
if not rs.bof then rs.movefirst end if
if rs.eof then exit function end if
while not rs.eof if cstr(rs("produkt_indeks")) = strProdInx then get_ilosc_by_inx = ccur(rs(strFldName)) exit function end if rs.movenext wend
end function
function bqry_stan_mag_for_faktury(byval idRej , byval dDataOd , byval dDataDo) bqry_stan_mag_for_faktury = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_indeks' = t_1.p_strIndeks, " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_id' = t_1.p_idobj, " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_nazwa' = max(t_1.p_strNazwa), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_kod_kreskowy' = max(t_1.c_strEAN), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_ilosc_sprzedana' = sum(t_0.c_curIloscOpak) , " + vbNewLine + _ " 'jednostka' = max(t_2.strSkrot) , " + vbNewLine + _ " 'jednostka_prec' = max(t_2.nDokladnosc) " + vbNewLine + _ " from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje as t_0 " + vbNewLine + _ " join vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania as t_1 on t_1.p_idobj = t_0.c_pProdukt and t_1.c_idobj = t_0.c_pOpak and t_1.coll_lp = 1 " + vbNewLine + _ " join n5jednostka as t_2 on t_2.idobj = t_1.c_pJednOpak " + vbNewLine + _ " where t_0.p_pRejestrDok = %1 and t_0.p_dDataWyst between %2 and %3 " + vbNewLine + _ " group by t_1.p_strIndeks,t_1.p_idobj " + vbNewLine + _ " order by produkt_indeks " + vbNewLine ) _ (cstr(idrej))(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataOd))(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataDo)).done() end function
function bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn( byval id_mag)
bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_indeks' = t_1.p_strIndeks, " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_id' = t_1.p_idobj, " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_nazwa' = max(t_1.p_strNazwa), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_kod_kreskowy' = max(t_1.c_strEAN), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_krotnosc' = max(t_1.c_currKrotnosc), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_ilosc' = sum(t_0.gms_curIlosc), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'jednostka' = max(t_4.strSkrot), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'jednostka_prec' = max(t_4.nDokladnosc) " + vbNewLine + _ " from n5gmstan as t_0 " + vbNewLine + _ " join vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania as t_1 on t_1.p_idobj = t_0.gms_pProd and t_1.c_idobj = t_0.gms_pOpak and t_1.coll_lp = 1 " + vbNewLine + _ " join n5jednostka as t_4 on t_4.idobj = t_1.c_pJednOpak " + vbNewLine + _ " where t_0.gms_pMag = %1 " + vbNewLine + _ " group by t_1.p_strIndeks,t_1.p_idobj " + vbNewLine + _ " order by produkt_indeks " + vbNewLine ) _ (cstr(id_mag)).done()
end function
function bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn_by_date_and_ilosc( byval id_mag , dDataOd , dDataDo)
dim numop_od,numop_do dim pModUtil : set pModUtil = doc_.getmodule(60253) if not pModUtil.convert_date_range_to_num_oper_range("ddatawyst between "+ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataOd) +" and "+ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataDo) +" ",numop_od,numop_do) then numop_od = clng(0) numop_do = clng(0) end if
bqry_stan_mag_for_magazyn_by_date_and_ilosc = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_indeks' = t_1.p_strIndeks, " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_id' = t_1.p_idobj, " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_nazwa' = max(t_1.p_strNazwa), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_kod_kreskowy' = max(t_1.c_strEAN), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_krotnosc' = max(t_1.c_currKrotnosc), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'produkt_ilosc' = sum(t_0.gmo_curIlosc), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'jednostka' = max(t_4.strSkrot), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'jednostka_prec' = max(t_4.nDokladnosc) " + vbNewLine + _ " from n5gmop as t_0 " + vbNewLine + _ " join vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania as t_1 on t_1.p_idobj = t_0.gmo_pProd and t_1.c_idobj = t_0.gmo_pOpak and t_1.coll_lp = 1 " + vbNewLine + _ " join n5jednostka as t_4 on t_4.idobj = t_1.c_pJednOpak " + vbNewLine + _ " where t_0.gmo_pMag = %1 " + vbNewLine + _ " and t_0.gmo_curIlosc > 0 " + vbNewLine + _ " and t_0.gmo_nNumOp between %2 and %3 " + vbNewLine + _ " group by t_1.p_strIndeks,t_1.p_idobj " + vbNewLine + _ " order by produkt_indeks " + vbNewLine ) _ (cstr(id_mag))(cstr(numop_od))(cstr(numop_do)).done()
end function
